data.title: Kaldalón hf. in Reykjavík, Iceland published a base prospectus for ISK 40,000,000,000 debt programme for bonds and bills.
data.description: Kaldalón hf., with registration number 490617-1320 and located at Köllunarklettsvegur 1, 104 Reykjavík, Iceland, has released a base prospectus for their debt issuance programme totaling ISK 40,000,000,000 for bonds and bills. The base prospectus, dated 18 July 2025, has received approval from the Financial Supervisory Authority of the Central Bank of Iceland.

data.title: UnionPay's 2025 Global Summer Campaign offers discounts, cashback, and perks to international travelers, launching on July 18.
data.description: UnionPay International has introduced its 2025 Global Summer Campaign in Shanghai on July 18, 2025. The campaign includes exclusive discounts, cashback rewards, and favorable exchange rates for international travelers during the global holiday season. This initiative aims to provide unique benefits to travelers with offers tailored to enhance their experience.

data.title: GSK's blood cancer drug faces US setback as FDA panel raises eye safety concerns. FDA committee votes against drug's benefit/risk at proposed dosage for relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma patients. 180,000+ new multiple myeloma cases yearly globally. GSK confident in drug's profile.
data.description: The FDA's Oncologic Drugs Advisory Committee voted against the overall benefit/risk profile of GSK plc's Blenrep combinations for adults with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma. Multiple myeloma, the third most common blood cancer globally, sees over 180,000 new cases diagnosed annually. GSK remains confident in Blenrep's benefit/risk profile. The FDA will consider the committee's recommendation before the July 23, 2025 PDUFA date. UK has authorized Blenrep in two combo regimens. GSK will cooperate with FDA for Blenrep's review in multiple myeloma patients.

data.title: OG coins rallying in early signs of altcoin season; XRP hits ATH, while Ethereum Classic, Litecoin, and Bitcoin Cash see gains.
data.description: On Thursday, XRP reached its highest price ever, while traditional cryptocurrencies like Ethereum Classic, Litecoin, and Bitcoin Cash also experienced significant increases in value.

data.title: Temenos awarded World's Best Core Banking Solution by Euromoney, considered prestigious in financial industry.
data.description: In Grand-Lancy, Switzerland, renowned banking technology leader Temenos (SIX: TEMN) has proudly revealed its latest achievement as the World’s Best Core Banking Solution in the esteemed Euromoney Awards for Excellence 2025. These awards, highly regarded in the financial services sector for their meticulous assessment methodology and unbiased nature, bestowed the Best Core Banking Solution accolade upon Temenos for its groundbreaking impact. This recognition emphasizes Temenos' unparalleled expertise and innovation in the industry.

data.title: $1.1B flowed into Ethereum and Bitcoin ETFs on July 17. Record inflow for ETH at $602M and $523M for BTC, continuing positive trend.Blooming investor optimism linked to macro indicators and regulatory clarity sparked the surge. BTC and ETH ETFs have gathered $54.3B and $7.09B in net inflows overall.
data.description: History was made on July 17th as Spot Ethereum ETFs witnessed a remarkable net inflow of $602 million, the second-largest influx ever recorded. This figure outstripped the net inflows of Bitcoin spot ETFs, which stood at $523 million on the same day, marking their 11th straight day of positive flow. Data from SoSoValue reveals that combined U.S. Bitcoin and Ethereum spot ETFs have attracted a total of $54.3 billion and $7.09 billion in cumulative net inflows, respectively. The sudden surge in investor interest can be attributed to growing market optimism, strong macroeconomic indicators, and increasing regulatory clarity, as highlighted in institutional research by Glassnode and Coinbase. Analysts have observed a significant shift in capital towards ETH products, indicating a broader trend in the market. This data points towards a positive momentum in the cryptocurrency space, with Ethereum gaining traction alongside Bitcoin.

data.title: Tariffs and expiring tax credits impact auto affordability post sales boom: US-built vehicles drop $200 on avg.
data.description: The prices of imported vehicles have gone up, while U.S.-built vehicles have decreased by an average of $200. This information was disclosed by Cars.com Inc. (NYSE: CARS), also known as Cars Commerce Inc., on July 18, 2025, in Chicago. The company highlighted the impact of federal policy changes on the automotive industry.

data.title: GenAI (CSE: AICO) provides update on MCTO issued by OSC for financial statements.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on July 18, 2025, Generative AI Solutions Corp. (referred to as "GenAI" or the "Company") is issuing an update regarding the management cease trade order (MCTO) issued by the British Columbia Securities Commission (OSC). The Company's stock is listed on the CSE under the symbol AICO and on the OTCQB under the symbol AICOF.
Treasury bond auction results for RIKB 27 0415 and RIKS 29 0917 were announced, achieving record numbers.

data.title: NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. appoints Matthew Priebe as CEO, replacing Alexander Tjiang. Tjiang will continue as Director.
data.description: In Vancouver, B.C., on July 18, 2025, NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. (CSE:NXT) (OTCQB:NXTDF) ( FSE:Z12 ) has appointed Matthew Priebe as the new Chief Executive Officer. Alexander Tjiang, the Interim Chief Executive Officer, will transition to the role of Director, offering ongoing strategic guidance. NextGen operates as a digital asset and fintech platform, connecting traditional capital markets with Web3 infrastructure. This announcement marks a significant change in leadership for the company.
